category_title: Disruptive and disengaged students who run around, fight, or ignore instruction
minimal_context: The student is using the VoiceThread online system to practice reading aloud and recording simple summarizing sentences.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please use the VoiceThread system to read aloud and record the simple summarizing sentences.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I feel particularly nervous before recording.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and press the record button.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to try to imitate your pronunciation when practicing and recording, but I am too nervous to start.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best and read the sentence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Can you help me practice the sentence before recording? I don't want to record it yet.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please use the VoiceThread system to read aloud and record the simple summarizing sentences.

STUDENT: I feel particularly nervous before recording.

TUTOR: Go ahead and press the record button.

STUDENT: I want to try to imitate your pronunciation when practicing and recording, but I am too nervous to start.

TUTOR: Just do your best and read the sentence.

STUDENT: Can you help me practice the sentence before recording? I don't want to record it yet.

task.content: Review keywords and read aloud simple summarizing sentences

context.materials: VoiceThread online system, audio and visual aids, color marker for doodling function
context.social_setting: Peers staying around to hear each other record and give support

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Before recording their reading of the summary sentences
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Asked the storyteller to help him practice the sentence before recording

behavior_patterns.condition: Before recording their reading of the summary sentences
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Asked the storyteller to help him practice the sentence before recording
